en: The righteous man perishes, and no one lays it to heart; devout men are taken away, while no one understands. For the righteous man is taken away from calamity;
zh: 義人死亡，沒有人放在心上； 虔誠人去世，也沒有人明白； 義人去世，是脫離了禍患。

en: he enters into peace; they rest in their beds who walk in their uprightness.
zh: 行事為人正直的， 死後必得進入平安， 在他們的墳墓裡享安息。

en: But you, draw near, sons of the sorceress, offspring of the adulterer and the loose woman.
zh: 但你們這些巫婦的兒子，姦夫和妓女的後裔啊！ 你們都走近這裡行姦淫吧！

en: Whom are you mocking? Against whom do you open your mouth wide and stick out your tongue? Are you not children of transgression, the offspring of deceit,
zh: 你們戲弄誰呢？ 你們張大嘴巴， 伸長舌頭戲弄誰呢？ 你們不是悖逆的孩子嗎？ 不是虛謊的後裔嗎？

en: you who burn with lust among the oaks, under every green tree, who slaughter your children in the valleys, under the clefts of the rocks?
zh: 你們在橡樹林中， 在青翠樹下慾火焚心； 在山谷間，在巖穴裡， 宰殺自己的孩子作祭牲。

en: Among the smooth stones of the valley is your portion; they, they, are your lot; to them you have poured out a drink offering, you have brought a grain offering. Shall I relent for these things?
zh: 在山谷中光滑的石頭裡有你的分； 只有它們是你所要得的分！ 你也向它們澆了奠祭， 獻上了供物。 這些事我豈能容忍不報復呢？

en: On a high and lofty mountain you have set your bed, and there you went up to offer sacrifice.
zh: 你在高高的山上安設你的床榻， 又上到那裡去獻祭。

en: Behind the door and the doorpost you have set up your memorial; for, deserting me, you have uncovered your bed, you have gone up to it, you have made it wide; and you have made a covenant for yourself with them, you have loved their bed, you have looked on nakedness.
zh: 你在門後，在門框後， 安設了外族神的記號； 你遠離了我，裸露了自己， 就上床去，又擴張你的床， 你也與他們立約； 你愛他們的床， 看他們的下體 。

en: You journeyed to the king with oil and multiplied your perfumes; you sent your envoys far off, and sent down even to Sheol.
zh: 你帶著油走到君王那裡， 並且加多了你的香料， 差派使者到遠方去， 你甚至自己下到陰間去！

en: You were wearied with the length of your way, but you did not say, "It is hopeless"; you found new life for your strength, and so you were not faint.
zh: 你因路途遙遠而困乏， 卻不說：“沒有希望了！” 因為你找著了生命的力量， 所以你不覺得疲倦。

en: Whom did you dread and fear, so that you lied, and did not remember me, did not lay it to heart? Have I not held my peace, even for a long time, and you do not fear me?
zh: 你怕誰？你因誰而懼怕， 以致你對我說謊呢？你不記念我， 也不把我放在心上， 是不是因為我長久緘默， 你就不懼怕我呢？

en: I will declare your righteousness and your deeds, but they will not profit you.
zh: 我要說明你的公義和你所作的， 但它們都必與你無益。

en: When you cry out, let your collection of idols deliver you! The wind will carry them off, a breath will take them away. But he who takes refuge in me shall possess the land and shall inherit my holy mountain.
zh: 你呼求的時候，讓你所收集的偶像拯救你吧！ 但一陣風要把它們全都颳走， 一口氣要把它們全部吹去。 然而那投靠我的，必承受地土， 得著我的聖山作產業。

en: And it shall be said, "Build up, build up, prepare the way, remove every obstruction from my people's way."
zh: 必有人說： “你們要填高，要填高，要修平道路； 把障礙物從我子民的路上除掉。”

en: For thus says the One who is high and lifted up, who inhabits eternity, whose name is Holy: "I dwell in the high and holy place, and also with him who is of a contrite and lowly spirit, to revive the spirit of the lowly, and to revive the heart of the contrite.
zh: 因為那至高無上、 永遠存在、他名為聖的這樣說： “雖然我住在至高至聖的地方， 卻與心靈痛悔和謙卑的人同在， 要使謙卑人的靈甦醒， 也使痛悔人的心甦醒。

en: For I will not contend forever, nor will I always be angry; for the spirit would grow faint before me, and the breath of life that I made.
zh: 我必不永遠爭辯， 也不長久發怒， 因為這樣，人的靈，就是我所造的人，在我面前就要發昏。

en: Because of the iniquity of his unjust gain I was angry, I struck him; I hid my face and was angry, but he went on backsliding in the way of his own heart.
zh: 因他貪婪的罪孽，我發怒了； 我擊打他，向他掩面，並且發怒， 他仍然隨著自己的心意背道。

en: I have seen his ways, but I will heal him; I will lead him and restore comfort to him and his mourners,
zh: 他的道路，我看見了， 我卻要醫治他，引導他，把安慰賞賜他和他的哀悼者。

en: creating the fruit of the lips. Peace, peace, to the far and to the near," says the LORD, "and I will heal him.
zh: 我創造嘴唇的果子： 平安，平安，歸給遠處的人，也歸給近處的人。” 耶和華說：“我要醫治他。”

en: But the wicked are like the tossing sea; for it cannot be quiet, and its waters toss up mire and dirt.
zh: 惡人卻像翻騰的海， 不能平靜， 海中的水不住翻起污穢和淤泥來。

en: There is no peace," says my God, "for the wicked."
zh: 我的 神說：“惡人必沒有平安。”
